Quirkless World: Knight x Nurse (FEMPOV)

A serious war has taken place in the Kingdom of Rivir. Luckily, they are in the lead. However, it doesn’t stop injuries. And the soldiers are desperate to get a nurse when the strongest man they have gets injured.
